title: UI Popup Concept Board AI
sourceTitle: UI Popup Concept Board AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Clean APP operation popup showcase board for new user welcome bonus. Subject: new user welcome bonus defines the campaign topic. Four popup cards show welcome coupon, first-order gift, onboarding checklist, and member sign-up reward as production-quality mobile UI concepts. Composition: Vertical 9:16 pure-white design proposal board with a top title and a precise 2x2 grid of four rounded popup cards; generous spacing, consistent hierarchy, and clear component alignment. Signature Elements: Each popup varies its icon element, information structure, benefit angle, and button treatment while staying in one coherent design system. Feature points include instant coupon, free trial badge, simple progress cue, and friendly claim button. Style: Polished app-design presentation with rounded cards, soft shadows, subtle glow edges, vivid but clean colors, tactile buttons, and small supportive 3D UI elements. Color Palette: Bright campaign colors balanced with white space and accessible contrast. Typography: Use the readable title NEW USER BENEFIT POPUPS; popup microcopy can be short, clean, and UI-like. Restrictions: Keep the transformed subject coherent, preserve the intended composition, maintain crisp visual detail, use clean readable text when present, and keep the background focused and uncluttered.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。

imagePrompts.title: UI Popup Concept Board New User Benefit Popups

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Clean APP operation popup showcase board for 618 limited promotion. Subject: 618 limited promotion defines the campaign topic. Four popup cards show flash sale alert, member-only discount, countdown reward, and bundle upgrade offer as production-quality mobile UI concepts. Composition: Vertical 9:16 pure-white design proposal board with a top title and a precise 2x2 grid of four rounded popup cards; generous spacing, consistent hierarchy, and clear component alignment. Signature Elements: Each popup varies its icon element, information structure, benefit angle, and button treatment while staying in one coherent design system. Feature points include limited-time price, countdown timer, gift badge, and one-tap claim button. Style: Polished app-design presentation with rounded cards, soft shadows, subtle glow edges, vivid but clean colors, tactile buttons, and small supportive 3D UI elements. Color Palette: Bright campaign colors balanced with white space and accessible contrast. Typography: Use the readable title 618 CAMPAIGN POPUP SYSTEM; popup microcopy can be short, clean, and UI-like. Restrictions: Keep the transformed subject coherent, preserve the intended composition, maintain crisp visual detail, use clean readable text when present, and keep the background focused and uncluttered.
